name: komand-expo
description: The full Expo / React Native plugin — Android, iOS, web, EAS, upgrades, everything — with one Komand-specific extension: iOS runs surface inside Komand's embedded iPhone preview instead of Apple's Simulator.app. Android and web workflows are identical to upstream Expo.

interface.shortDescription: Build, deploy, debug, and upgrade Expo apps across iOS, Android, and web — iOS runs surface inside Komand's iPhone preview
interface.longDescription: The complete Expo-authored skill set — Expo Router UI, API routes, data fetching, styling, native modules, dev clients, Expo Go, SDK upgrades, EAS builds, App Store / Play Store deployments, web hosting — preserved as shipped by Expo. Komand's extension is additive and iOS-scoped: a new `expo-ios-debugger` skill routes iOS runs through XcodeBuildMCP's `build_sim` / `install_app_sim` / `launch_app_sim` flow so the running app surfaces inside Komand's embedded iPhone preview instead of Apple's Simulator.app. Android, web, Expo Go, EAS workflows, and CI/CD are unchanged from upstream Expo.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use Expo (Komand) for building, deploying, upgrading, and debugging Expo and React Native apps across iOS, Android, and web. iOS runs surface inside Komand's embedded iPhone preview automatically; Android, web, Expo Go, and EAS workflows behave exactly like upstream Expo.
